title: "WHERE 0" on the first element of a UNION causes an assertion fault
poc: SELECT * FROM abc WHERE 0 UNION SELECT * FROM def;
key_bug_features: SELECT * FROM abc WHERE 0 UNION SELECT * FROM def
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE abc(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, PRIMARY KEY(a));
CREATE TABLE def(d INTEGER, e TEXT DEFAULT 'default', f BLOB);
SELECT * FROM abc WHERE 1 UNION SELECT * FROM def WHERE e IS NOT NULL;
